sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, is_active Boolean) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, toBool(toUInt8(1))), (2, toBool(toInt8(0)));
SELECT id, is_active FROM test_table WHERE is_active = toBool('true');
UPDATE test_table SET is_active = toBool('FALSE') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toBool(toFloat32(1.5)) AS is_active_float FROM test_table;
